creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sun Mar 24 14:32:38 2013
New Revision: 315124
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315124

Log:
  - Update to 10.2
  - Stop installing .DS_Store files
  
  PR:		ports/177293
  Submitted by:	Chris Petrik <c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/tikiwiki/Makefile
  head/www/tikiwiki/distinfo
  head/www/tikiwiki/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/tikiwiki/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/tikiwiki/Makefile	Sun Mar 24 14:23:56 2013	(r315123)
+++ head/www/tikiwiki/Makefile	Sun Mar 24 14:32:38 2013	(r315124)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	tikiwiki
-PORTVERSION=	10.1
+PORTVERSION=	10.2
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/Tiki_10.x_Sun/${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=	tiki-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -34,6 +34,7 @@ x-generate-plist: extract
 do-extract:
 	${MKDIR} ${WRKDIR}
 	${TAR} -yxf ${DISTDIR}/${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} -C ${WRKDIR}
+	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name '.DS_Store' -delete
 
 do-install:
 	-${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${TIKIWIKI_DIR}

Modified: head/www/tikiwiki/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/tikiwiki/distinfo	Sun Mar 24 14:23:56 2013	(r315123)
+++ head/www/tikiwiki/distinfo	Sun Mar 24 14:32:38 2013	(r315124)

+SIZE (tiki-10.2.tar.gz) = 30609605
